name: ASUS ROG CROSSHAIR X670E GENE Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 1x M.2 Slot - 2x USB4 Type-C - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.2 - ROG GEN-Z.2 Card
